sizing_rule.note: Use geometric mean (via optimal f / bin analysis) instead of arithmetic expectation when sizing positions in scenarios where past P&L affects available capital for future trades. Author does not specify numeric parameters—geometric vs arithmetic distinction is the core rule.

source_rule_text: Use geometric mean instead of arithmetic mathematical expectation for position sizing decisions when money risked today will be risked again on future events, as past gains/losses affect available capital for current trades.
